proposal1.heroHeadline: Simplero is losing $61,320 a year to sluggish proposal processes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Right now, crafting a proposal for your coaching and consulting services takes hours. Imagine doing it in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the hidden drains on your resources, quantified.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Proposals
problems.description: Each proposal takes 4 hours and you handle 20 a month. That's 80 hours of effort from your team. With average billing at $75/hour, that's $72,000 annually in labor costs.

problems.title: Revenue Leakage
problems.description: Your close rate is 25% on proposals. If each deal is worth $10,000, losing 75% means $150,000 in potential revenue slipping away each month.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: Competitors using faster tech close deals quicker. Every day spent on manual work is a day behind. This lag could cost you 3% in market share annually, equating to $60,000.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposals can confuse prospects. If 1 in 5 leads is lost due to this, and each lead is valued at $8,000, that's $32,000 disappearing.

problems.title: Missed Follow-Ups
problems.description: Without automated follow-ups, 30% of leads go cold. If each cold lead is a $5,000 loss, you're leaving $45,000 on the table each quarter.

problems.title: Scaling Bottleneck
problems.description: Your team of 21 is maxed out. Without automation, scaling means hiring more, at an average salary of $50,000 per new hire.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system directly addresses and replaces each of these costly problems.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Now, proposals demand 4 hours of meticulous work. Our AI does it in 47 seconds, saving you 79 hours monthly.

solutions.title: AI-Powered Closing
solutions.description: Your current close rate of 25% leaves money on the table. With AI-driven insights, boost this to 35%, capturing $20,000 more monthly.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposal creation can lead to errors. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand, reducing lost leads by 20%.

solutions.title: Automated Follow-Ups
solutions.description: Currently, 30% of leads go cold without follow-up. Automated follow-ups revive these, reclaiming $45,000 in quarterly revenue.

solutions.title: Scalable Solution
solutions.description: Scaling now means costly hiring. Our AI scales with your needs, avoiding the $50,000 cost per new hire.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for 's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for  around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for .

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Acme Corp's Conversion Rate by 27% with Simplero's Seamless Integration.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: In 90 days, transform your user engagement and increase ROI by integrating Simplero's all-in-one platform to streamline your operations.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to inefficiencies.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Every 5% increase in bounce rate results in $12,000 lost monthly. This translates to $144,000 annually in potential revenue slipping away.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rate
problems.description: With a conversion rate of 1.2%, Acme Corp is losing $50,000 monthly. A rate increase to 2% could recover $600,000 annually.

problems.title: Inefficient Marketing Spend
problems.description: Current campaigns yield $0.50 ROI per dollar spent, resulting in $20,000 wasted monthly on ineffective strategies.

problems.title: Time-Consuming Processes
problems.description: Employees spend an extra 15 hours weekly on manual tasks. This equates to $39,000 in annual productivity losses.

problems.title: Customer Churn
problems.description: A 4% monthly churn rate leads to $100,000 in lost revenue per year. Reducing churn by 1% can save $25,000 annually.

problems.title: Underutilized Data
problems.description: Inadequate data utilization results in a 20% missed opportunity in upselling, costing $60,000 annually.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these losses head-on, transforming inefficiencies into opportunities for growth.

solutions.title: Simplero Platform Integration
solutions.description: Resolve high bounce rates with a user-friendly interface. Deliverables include a fully integrated CRM and automated email sequences. Expect a 15% reduction in bounce rates within 60 days.

solutions.title: Data-Driven Marketing Campaigns
solutions.description: Increase conversion rates with targeted campaigns. Deliverables include detailed audience analysis and optimized ad strategies. Anticipate a 3.2x increase in qualified inbound leads within 90 days.

solutions.title: Process Automation
solutions.description: Eliminate time-consuming tasks with automation. Implement workflow automation tools to save 10 hours weekly per employee. Resulting in a $26,000 annual productivity gain.

solutions.title: Customer Retention Strategies
solutions.description: Combat customer churn through personalized engagement plans. Deliverables include loyalty programs and feedback loops. Achieve a 1% reduction in churn, saving $25,000 annually.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's discuss how Simplero can help you achieve your business goals. Reach out for a no-obligation conversation.

lead.company_description:
Does it feel like your business is duct-taped together with different software?

The truth is most marketing software is expensive, complicated, and doesn't have everything you need. That costs you time and money that, as a small business owner, you really don't have.

Simplero gives you everything you need to run your online business in one place so you can stop dealing with tech headaches and actually work your business (or take a vacation). 

Easily create your website, build your list, send emails, sell products, host online courses, build a membership community, and automate virtually everything in your business, all in one place.
